title: Shared review
description: Review the complete pyxlsx implementation against the spec. Verify: output contract adherence (JSON stdout, errors to stderr, exit code 1 on failure), defusedxml used for all XML parsing with no xml.etree.ElementTree parsing calls, atomic writes in all write ops, type inference correctness in set_cell(), ISO-8601 datetime serialisation, duplicate header suffix logic in read_table(), test coverage of all specified error paths, and zero cross-imports or shared code with pypptx.
acceptance_criteria: xml.etree.ElementTree is not used for parsing anywhere in ops/pack.py
All write ops (set_cell, add_sheet, delete_sheet, rename_sheet, pack) use atomic temp-file-then-os.replace()
output_result() correctly handles JSON and --plain for all commands
Tests cover all error paths specified in the spec
SKILL.md accurately reflects the implemented commands and their JSON output shapes
No imports from pypptx or shared configuration with pypptx
